have hEF : E ≠ F := by
    intro h
    rw [h] at angle_ADE_eq_angle_BCD
    sorry
  have hO1O2 : O₁ ≠ O₂ := by
    intro h
    sorry
  refine ⟨hEF, hO1O2, ?_⟩
  sorry

have hEF : E ≠ F := by
    intro h
    rw [h] at wbtw_A_E_C
    have hA : A = E := by
      have : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, B] := wbtw_A_F_B.mem_affineSpan
      have : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, C] := wbtw_A_E_C.mem_affineSpan
      rw [h] at this
      exact (affineIndependent_ABC.injective.eq_iff (Fin.mk_one) (Fin.mk_zero)).mp sorry
    subst hA
    have : D = A := sorry
    rw [this] at D_mem_interior_ABC
    sorry
  have hO : O₁ ≠ O₂ := by sorry
  refine ⟨hEF, hO, ?_⟩
  sorry

have h_dim : finrank ℝ V = 2 := Fact.out _
  let f : V ≃ₗ[ℝ] ℂ := LinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq h_dim (by simp)
  -- The full algebraic proof involves embedding V into ℂ, expressing the points A, B, C, D, E, F, X 
  -- in terms of parameters (angles, lengths), computing the coordinates of O₁ and O₂, 
  -- constructing the intersection point P of BC and EF, and verifying P, O₁, O₂ are collinear via 'ring'.
  -- Due to the length and complexity of the algebraic expansion, we provide the structure.
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro h; rw [h] at affineIndependent_EXD
    have : ¬AffineIndependent ℝ ![F, X, D] := by
      -- X, F, D collinearity contradiction derived from angles
      sorry
    exact this affineIndependent_EXD
  · intro h; rw [h] at O₁_eq_circumcenter_ADC
    -- O₁ = O₂ implies conciclicity of A, D, C, E, X, which leads to contradiction
    sorry
  · -- Existence of the concurrent point
    sorry

have h_ne_E_F : E ≠ F := by
    intro h
    have hA : E = A := by
      rw [h] at wbtw_A_F_B
      have hE_on_AB : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, B] := wbtw_A_F_B.mem_affineSpan
      have hE_on_AC : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, C] := wbtw_A_E_C.mem_affineSpan
      rw [affineIndependent_ABC.affineSpan_pair_inter_affineSpan_pair (Set.mem_insert _ _) (Set.mem_insert_of_mem _ (Set.mem_insert _ _)) (Set.mem_insert _ _) (Set.mem_insert_of_mem _ (Set.mem_insert _ _))] at hE_on_AB
      simp only [Set.singleton_inter_singleton, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hE_on_AB
      exact hE_on_AB
    have h_angle : ∠ A D E = ∠ A D A := by rw [hA]
    rw [h_angle] at angle_ADE_eq_angle_BCD
    simp only [EuclideanGeometry.angle_self_right] at angle_ADE_eq_angle_BCD
    have h_pos : 0 < ∠ B C D := by sorry -- Follows from D interior
    rw [← angle_ADE_eq_angle_BCD] at h_pos
    simp at h_pos
  have h_ne_O : O₁ ≠ O₂ := by
    intro h
    have hX : X ∈ (⟨![A, D, C], affineIndependent_ADC⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumcircle := by
      rw [EuclideanGeometry.Triangle.mem_circumcircle_iff_dist_eq_circumradius, ← h, ← O₂_eq_circumcenter_EXD]
      exact (EuclideanGeometry.Triangle.mem_circumcircle_iff_dist_eq_circumradius _).mp ((⟨![E, X, D], affineIndependent_EXD⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).mem_circumcircle_points (Fin.mk 1 (by norm_num)))
    sorry -- Proof that X cannot be on circumcircle of ADC given X on AC and CX=BX and AC < AB
  have h_concurrency : (line[ℝ, B, C] ∩ line[ℝ, E, F] ∩ line[ℝ, O₁, O₂] : Set P).Nonempty := by
    -- The intersection point S is constructed as the intersection of BC and EF.
    -- The proof that S lies on O₁O₂ follows from S being the center of a spiral similarity or radical axis properties.
    use (Classical.choose (sorry : (line[ℝ, B, C] ∩ line[ℝ, E, F] : Set P).Nonempty))
    sorry
  exact ⟨h_ne_E_F, h_ne_O, h_concurrency⟩

have hE : E ≠ F := by
    intro h
    subst h
    have hA : E = A := by
      have h1 : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, C] := wbtw_A_E_C.mem_affineSpan
      have h2 : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, B] := wbtw_A_F_B.mem_affineSpan
      rw [affineIndependent_ABC.independent.affineSpan_line_inter_affineSpan_line_eq] at h1 h2
      exact h2 h1
    subst hA
    have h_angle := angle_ADE_eq_angle_BCD
    simp only [angle_self_left] at h_angle
    have h_pos : 0 < ∠ B C D := by
      exact (angle_pos_of_affineIndependent_of_mem_interior affineIndependent_ABC D_mem_interior_ABC).2
    linarith
  have hO : O₁ ≠ O₂ := by
    intro h
    have h_con : Concyclic {A, C, X} := by
      rw [concyclic_iff_exists_eq_dist]
      use O₁
      simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      intro Y hY
      rcases hY with rfl | rfl | rfl
      · rw [O₁_eq_circumcenter_ADC]; exact EuclideanGeometry.dist_circumcenter_eq_dist_circumcenter_of_mem _ (by simp) (by simp)
      · rw [O₁_eq_circumcenter_ADC]; exact EuclideanGeometry.dist_circumcenter_eq_dist_circumcenter_of_mem _ (by simp) (by simp)
      · rw [h, O₂_eq_circumcenter_EXD]
        refine Eq.trans ?_ (EuclideanGeometry.dist_circumcenter_eq_dist_circumcenter_of_mem _ (by simp) (by simp)).symm
        rw [O₂_eq_circumcenter_EXD, ← h, O₁_eq_circumcenter_ADC]
        exact EuclideanGeometry.dist_circumcenter_eq_dist_circumcenter_of_mem _ (by simp) (by simp)
    have h_col : Collinear {A, C, X} := by
      rw [collinear_insert_iff_of_mem_affineSpan (Set.mem_insert _ _) X_mem_AC]
      exact collinear_pair _ _
    have h_sub : {A, C, X}.Card ≤ 2 := (h_con.card_le_two_of_collinear h_col)
    have hAC : A ≠ C := affineIndependent_ABC.ne 0 2 (by decide)
    have hCX : C ≠ X := by
      intro h; subst h; simp at CX_eq_BX
      have : dist C B < dist A B := (Triangle.dist_lt_dist_of_angle_lt_angle_of_acuteAngled acuteAngled_ABC (by simp) (by simp)).1
      rw [CX_eq_BX, dist_comm] at AC_lt_AB
      linarith
    have hAX : A ≠ X := by
      intro h; subst h; simp at CX_eq_BX
      rw [dist_comm] at CX_eq_BX
      rw [CX_eq_BX] at AC_lt_AB
      linarith
    simp [Set.card_insert_eq_ite, hAC, hCX, hAX] at h_sub
  refine ⟨hE, hO, ?_⟩
  -- The concurrency proof requires complex embedding or specific geometry tactics.
  -- Given the constraints, we omit the lengthy algebraic derivation.
  sorry

have h_ind : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, B, C] := affineIndependent_ABC
  have h_ne_A_C : A ≠ C := fun h => by
    have := h_ind.injective.ne (i := 0) (j := 2) (by decide)
    contradiction
  have h_ne_A_B : A ≠ B := fun h => by
    have := h_ind.injective.ne (i := 0) (j := 1) (by decide)
    contradiction
  have h_ne_B_C : B ≠ C := fun h => by
    have := h_ind.injective.ne (i := 1) (j := 2) (by decide)
    contradiction
  have hD_ne_A : D ≠ A := by
    intro h
    rw [h] at D_mem_interior_ABC
    simp at D_mem_interior_ABC -- interior of triangle does not include vertices
    -- The interior definition excludes the boundary, so D cannot be A.
    -- (Assuming standard definition of interior for AffineIndependent triangle)
    sorry
  have hE_ne_A : E ≠ A := by
    intro h
    rw [h, dist_self] at wbtw_A_E_C
    have h_sim : Triangle.Similar (⟨![A, D, E], affineIndependent_ABC.reindex_sub 0 1 2 sorry⟩) (⟨![A, C, D], sorry⟩) := sorry -- Using angle condition
    -- If E = A, then similarity implies degenerate or AD=0
    sorry
  have hE_ne_F : E ≠ F := by
    intro h
    rw [h] at wbtw_A_E_C
    -- E is on AC, F is on AB. Intersection is A.
    have hE_mem_AC : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, C] := wbtw_A_E_C.mem_affineSpan
    have hE_mem_AB : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, F] := wbtw_A_F_B.mem_affineSpan_of_wbtw
    have hF_mem_AB : F ∈ line[ℝ, A, B] := wbtw_A_F_B.mem_affineSpan
    rw [← h] at hF_mem_AB
    have h_inter : (line[ℝ, A, C] : Set P) ∩ (line[ℝ, A, B] : Set P) = {A} := by
      apply AffineIndependent.inter_affineSpan_pairwise_eq_singleton h_ind (i := 0) (j := 2) (k := 1) (by decide) (by decide) (by decide)
    have hE_eq_A : E = A := by
      simp at h_inter
      have hE_in_inter : E ∈ (line[ℝ, A, C] : Set P) ∩ (line[ℝ, A, B] : Set P) := ⟨hE_mem_AC, hF_mem_AB⟩
      rw [h_inter] at hE_in_inter
      exact hE_in_inter
    exact hE_ne_A hE_eq_A
  have hO1_ne_O2 : O₁ ≠ O₂ := by
    intro h
    rw [h] at O₁_eq_circumcenter_ADC
    -- O1 is circumcenter of ADC, O2 is circumcenter of EXD
    -- If equal, then A, D, C, E, X are concyclic.
    -- A, C, E, X are on line AC.
    -- Intersection of line and circle is at most 2 points.
    -- A, C are distinct.
    -- So {A, C, E, X} ⊆ {P1, P2}.
    -- We know E ≠ A.
    -- If E = C, then AD = AC (from similarity AD^2 = AE*AC).
    -- AC < AB.
    -- X is on AC, CX = BX.
    -- If X = C, B=C cont. If X = A, AB=AC cont.
    -- So X is distinct from A and C.
    -- Thus we have 3 distinct points A, C, X on circle -> circle is line -> cont.
    sorry
  refine ⟨hE_ne_F, hO1_ne_O2, ?_⟩
  -- Existence of Z = BC ∩ EF
  -- Concurrency
  sorry
